services.name: Standard Home Clean
services.description: Regular weekly or fortnightly upkeep cleaning

services.name: End-of-Lease / Bond Clean
services.description: Bond-back guaranteed cleaning for rental moves

services.name: Eco-Friendly / Green Clean
services.description: Non-toxic, sustainable cleaning with eco products

faq.question: How much does cleaning cost?
faq.answer: Prices start from $149 for standard home cleaning. Final quotes are calculated based on property size, service type, and current availability. Use our instant quote tool for accurate pricing.

faq.question: Do you service my suburb?
faq.answer: We service most suburbs across NSW, VIC, QLD, WA, and SA. Enter your suburb in our instant quote tool to check availability in your area.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept all major credit/debit cards through secure Stripe checkout, PayPal, and bank transfer. Payment is required at time of booking.

faq.question: Can I cancel or reschedule?
faq.answer: Yes! You can reschedule or cancel up to 24 hours before your appointment for a full refund. Late cancellations may incur a fee.

faq.question: Are your cleaners police-checked?
faq.answer: Yes, all AussieClean cleaners undergo comprehensive background checks, are fully insured, and complete our vetting process including reference verification.

faq.question: Do you guarantee the clean?
faq.answer: Yes! We offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy with any aspect of our service, we'll return and re-clean for free.

faq.question: How long does booking take?
faq.answer: Our instant quote and booking system takes under 2 minutes. Select your service, enter your details, and confirm payment - it's that quick!

faq.question: What happens if something is damaged?
faq.answer: All our cleaners are fully insured for up to $5 million. In the rare event of any damage, simply contact us and we'll arrange immediate compensation or repair.

faq.question: Do I need to be home during the clean?
faq.answer: Not at all! Many customers provide a key or access code. We'll send you a notification when the cleaner arrives and completes the job.

faq.question: What products do you use?
faq.answer: We use premium eco-certified products that are safe for children and pets. For our eco-clean service, we use 100% plant-based, biodegradable products.

policies.title: Cancellation Policy
policies.content: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before booking. Late cancellations: 50% fee. No-shows: full charge.

policies.title: Satisfaction Guarantee
policies.content: 100% satisfaction guarantee - if you're not happy, we'll re-clean for free within 24 hours.

policies.title: Pricing Policy
policies.content: All prices include GST. Dynamic pricing applies based on demand, time slot, and availability. Final quote confirmed before payment.

pricing.response: I can help you get an instant quote! Just tell me about your property (size, rooms) and the service you need. Or click 'Book Now' for an exact price.

booking.response: Great choice! You can book instantly on our site - takes less than 2 minutes. Would you like help choosing the right service?

location.response: We service most areas! What's your suburb? I can check if we cover your area and show you available time slots.

services.response: We offer 18+ cleaning services - from standard home cleans to end-of-lease, carpet cleaning, commercial, and specialised cleaning. What's your situation?

contact.response: For urgent enquiries, call 1300 CLEAN AU (1300 253 262). Otherwise, I'm happy to help you book online right now!
